name: First Cutt Indoor Golf
about: First Cutt Indoor Golf is a golf simulation venue offering a high-tech experience for players of all skill levels. The facility provides a modern environment for golf practice, play, and socializing. Pricing is available on a per-bay or per-person basis, making it suitable for both casual visits and serious practice sessions.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals may be available, but it's recommended to bring your own for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified in the provided information.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator take approximately 1-2 hours depending on player pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Kid-friendliness is not specified in the provided information.
